name: My Spritz Dainties for Cookie Press
recipeInstructions:
Recipe by: H. PEAGRAM
Preheat oven to 375°F.
Combine butter and brown sugar, beating until creamy.
Add egg yolk and vanilla, beating well.
Stir together sifted flour, salt, and baking soda.
Blend into the creamed mixture.
Press dough through a desired disk onto an ungreased cookie sheet.
Brush tops with slightly beaten egg white.
Decorate as desired.
Bake for 8 to 10 minutes.
